ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference designations for the component */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value or type of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was manufactured */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the component (if applicable) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Specific storage conditions required for the component */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for reordering the component from the vendor */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the component */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the vendor */,
  "shipping_terms" TEXT /* Shipping terms agreed with the vendor */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the vendor's service */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer responsible for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component is used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was used */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the component used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the component was used (e.g., production line, testing lab) */,
  "used_by" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer who used the component */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_used_by FOREIGN KEY ("used_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the engineer */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the engineer was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engineers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorder_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder request */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being reordered */,
  "quantity_requested" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the reordered components */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the reordered components */,
  "requisitioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reorder request */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_requests_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_requests_requisitioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("requisitioner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, procurement manager, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
